description: A project file received from a freelancer has broken file paths referencing a non-existent external drive. Relink the offline character level in the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/broken_scene/missing_link.tnz' to the backup assets in '/home/ga/OpenToonz/assets/restored_media/'. Render Frame 1 of the corrected scene as a PNG to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/relink_test/fixed_frame.png'.
